textByHash.40f54e3099d72ec06c837847b2718ed7f7b3a761: He did. I suppose he has asked you to tell me he's sorry. What an empty gesture!
textByHash.82b7c5ebdac69b8e160c61ec7a367208e65d14b3: At last I feel complete. Fare well.
textByHash.93b2583f6d28ce946d95e90214bc35558706b88d: A sapphire amulet! He remembers! It's just like the one he gave me before he left.
textByHash.b0895cc006526831e9bcca199481bc908036040e: That I am. What's it to you?
textByHash.c8ac8d4fb430934d6473ddc0be76310d7cfdc82d: Oh why did he leave me? Did he truly love me?
textByHash.d36d522b801245b42b7941167409f6800881d551: You're giving me empty words. That is all.
textByHash.ec3162c08c3a8edbfccabbcc5bf0df0021370238: I'm so glad. Please, tell him I forgive him!
